narrative:
Van Buren Twp township has 986 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.9 percentage points.
